feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Can we see in SAC how much disk space we have used?
entry.content: Hello. The "System Usage by Storage" tab no longer exists. Any idea where I can find this information?

entry.title: How to generate a subroutine pool(MMCP****) in SAP ?
entry.content:
While Creating a sales order for a custom order type 'ABCD', with the given sales area , customer and material, I am getting a dump at a system generated subroutine pool 'MMCP6***; .

This generated program is having syntax error at group by clause.

Now, as the system is non modifiable here. So, what is the possible way to generate this subroutine pool in this client ? This subroutine is available in each and every system but there is no any clue how it got generated.

entry.title: S/4 EHS: Hazardous substance inventory cannot be created, no location shown
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

in the module "S/4HANA EHS Workplace Safety" (risk assessment) in the app "Manage hazardous substance inventories (HSI)" we have the error that no HSI can be created because no location can be selected. 

No locations can be selected although locations are created and assigned to the plant. And in the customizing activity "IMG Configure Hazardous Substance Inventory" the plant was assigned to location type. 

Additional information: our customer is using one backend system and one frontend system for the fiori launchpad

  • locations and chemicals are maintained in NWBC opened from the backend system. Services EHFND_UI_CHM_ENTRY and EHFND_UI_LOC_ENTRY are only activated on the backend system
  • On the front end system the services for the App "Manage hazardous substance inventories" are activated

Are there further configurations to be checked?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: PR value not getting copied into PO
entry.content:
"My situation is that the PR are created automatically from the Plant Maintenance Order instead of manually, therefore, the Buyer will just need to convert the PR to PO. But the problem is the default option is Do Not Adopt, and I've tried to use Parameter ID in the User master, but there's no parameter ID available for that field. Some experts asked to create new parameter ID and it sounds like a bit complicated. So I thought whether there's any option in OMET, with the default to "As Gross Price" or "As Net Price" instead of "Do Not Adopt"."

I have just found a solution for that. It's pretty easy. When you already have parameter set and additional field is visible in Purchase Requisition, just go to the Personal settings in the Purchase Requisition and set default value for it - this field will be there after EFB parameter assignment. So you can set value 1 or 2.

entry.title: More than one consumption in reprocess - K265 Register
entry.content:
K265 register
Hello.
I need support to understand how to generate the K265 reprocessing record when consumption of material equal to that produced and also other materials occurs.
I was unable to understand the composition of the shadow /TMF/D_REPR_MAT for these cases.

Example:
Material produced = mat1
Material consumed = mat1
Material consumed = mat2
Material consumed = mat3

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for product compliance: Unable to delete...
entry.content:
Hello

I  can not judge based on the informations in your questions.

The new process (according to my experiments) is taking care a lot of data (and set p can be different per SAP system).

E.g. You have prepared CCI and linked material... now material might be still used in some logistic process. 

PLease explan step by step (what set up are you using etc.).

E.g. The material in scope might have a set up so that a CCI is mandarory. So you should not be able to delete this (the link material/CCI) the material would be "not compliant" any more,

So we need more informations: what is your starting situation? What do you would like to get etc.

C.B.

entry.title: Re: How can I connect my SAP BTP Kyma with my On-Premise system (ECC6 EHP7) via RFC
entry.content:
Hi, we are have the same problem, were you able to solve it?

We are getting

In BTP Destinations are defined and are working

In Kyma we have an error when trying to connect

message: Technical connectivity is not configured.

reason: ConfigurationError-ReferencedDestinationServiceInstance-DoesNotExist

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for product compliance: Unable to delete...
entry.content:
Hello again Christoph.

I had a reply from Marko Lange at SAP, in another thread in a different group (chemicals). The problem seems to be something specific on the customer's system or the data. Eventually the customer will have to open a ticket.

Thanks for your concern

entry.title: Re: How to generate a subroutine pool(MMCP****) in SAP ?
entry.content: As it is standard program, you should check the SAP notes and contact SAP support.

entry.title: incoming payment against a single order -Validation
entry.content:
Hi ,

Validation / check required: We should not be able to add an incoming payment of more than 1,99,500 in CASH against one sales order - whether this has been taken across multiple days or multiple times in the same day. The sum total of incoming cash type incoming payment against a single order must not exceed 1,99,500.

 

I tried to right this query but could not get the expected result 
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
    IF @object_type = N'24' AND ( @transaction_type  IN ('A','U'))                                                              
 
BEGIN                                                                              
       if exists (SELECT t3.DocEntry   
        From ORCT t3
Inner Join RCT2 on RCT2.DocNum = t3.DocEntry
inner join ODPI T4 on RCT2.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry and T4.ObjType = RCT2.InvType
inner join DPI1 t5 on t5.DocEntry=t4.DocEntry
inner join RDR1 t7 on t7.DocEntry=t5.BaseEntry and t7.ObjType=t5.BaseType-- and t7.LineNum=t5.BaseLine
inner join ORDR t8 on t8.DocEntry=t7.DocEntry
   
   where t3.DocEntry =@list_of_cols_val_tab_del  and t3.CashSum>=199500  )                                    
      BEGIN                                                            
    SELECT @Error = 122                                      
     SELECT @error_message = 'cash cant receive more then 199500'                                                            
      END                                                              
END  
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Re: Send email when Forward a work item
entry.content:
Step 1) Implement the program exit in the User decision task. i.e., by providing a custom class name that implements the Interface 'IF_SWF_IFS_WORKITEM_EXIT' in it.

Step 2) In the 'event_raised' method of the class get the header details. Example code: data(ls_header) = im_workitem_context->get_header( ).

step 3) Now pass the work item id from ls_header to function module 'SAP_WAPI_GET_WI_AGENTS' to get the user id to which the workitem is forwarded.

step4) Now use BCS classes to send mail to the forwarded class.

entry.title: List of users which can create or change something
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on SAP ECC and I was wondering this : I want to display all users that can create or change something in SAP ( I want them to be able only to display SAP objects and data not creating nor changing )

Thanks

Best regards,

Roméo.

entry.title: Re: /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp is not a deployable CAP...
entry.content:
I am experiencing the same issue... I am unable to Right click and deploy the MTA yaml from the archive. 

I got it to work using the following commands: 

mbt build -t ./

cf deploy [insertyourProjectsName].mtar

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM custom metrics
entry.content:
Hi 

We wanted to set up custom monitoring such as spool, temse & so on. Also  we wanted to configure email notification for these custom events.

Could you please help us from where I should start? 

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM custom metrics
entry.content:
Currently SAP Cloud ALM only supports custom Health Monitoring metrics for the BTP ABAP environment.
More information can be found at the Developing Metrics for Health Monitoring guide on the SAP Help Portal.

Please vote on the relevant Customer Influence program idea if you desire the support for custom metrics from on-premise systems.

If you desire custom metrics for a different environment or SAP Product, please examine the SAP Cloud ALM for Operations Customer Influence program idea list for an appropriate entry and vote on it. 
If you cannot find an existing idea entry, create a new one to document your desire.

entry.title: Re: Public cloud interface development
entry.content: hi

entry.title: Steps to activate workflow and external notifications on SAP S/4HANA.
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

Can u help me to know Steps to activate workflow and external notifications on SAP S/4HANA.

entry.title: Developing and Extending SAP Fiori by VSCODE
entry.content:
Hi!

  I'm creating the Fiori Screen but I'm having a problem as shown below.

  It was created it using the 'Overview Page' Template and then added the Card using 'Guied Development' - 'Add_an analytical card to_an overview page' but it is showing an error. (Shown below where there should be a Chart).

  Attached the annotation created.

  Could anyone advise how to find the reason for the error?

entry.title: Re: Process Automation: Capital Expenditure Approval Proc...
entry.content:
Hi Ivan,

Understood, I will do so. Thank you for your advice.

I will update my post, once I receive a response.

Best regards,
Atakan

entry.title: Re: Authentication incorrect to connect to SAP system via...
entry.content:
For a Developer Extension in S4Hana Cloud, Public Edition I have on a similar situation. 

According to the example, Create Your Own Gadget Shopping App Using Developer Extensibility, it can't login to the customised oData v2

Has anyone a great Idea to resolve that situation? 

  1. Data source: OData Service
  2. in Eclipse ADT created Service URL
  3. Username from S4Hana Cloud, Public Edition (the same, what I enter into the Browser, when I'm open the preview into the Browser)
  4. The Password from 3.
  5. Klick on Login
  6. Notice (Authentication incorrect)

Best regards and Thank you for your Attention
